mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_event (aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, topic, status, created_at, retry_count, correlation_id, trace_parent) VALUES (#{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{topic}, #{status}, NOW(), #{retryCount}, #{correlationId}, #{traceParent})
mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, topic, status, created_at, sent_at, retry_count, correlation_id, trace_parent FROM outbox_event WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM outbox_event WHERE status = 'SENT' AND sent_at < #{before}
